 What’s in store for Andhra Pradesh! –
Andhra Pradesh is celebrating her ‘Formation Day’ on November 1, and our astrologer K
Gopalakrishnan looks at the chart and predicts about what is in store for this fast developing
state headed by the CEO Chandrababu Naidu.
Technical details
Andhra Pradesh has begun the Dasa of Venus recently. The Dasa lord is the 2nd and 9th
lord placed in the 12th house along with 3rd and the 8th lord. From Kalkaska lagna the 4th
